title: 「Wish + Past Tense」句型
titleZh: 「Wish + Past Tense」表達與現在事實不同的願望
titleEn: Using Wish + Past Tense to express wishes that differ from present reality

source.file: Sentence Structure 71 -「Wish + Past Tense」表達與現在事實不同的願望.pdf

formula: Subject 1 + wish / wishes + Subject 2 + past simple + other information

formulas.formula: Subject 1 + wish / wishes + Subject 2 + past simple

formulas.labelEn: Negative form with an ordinary verb
formulas.formula: Subject 1 + wish / wishes + Subject 2 + did not + base verb
Subject 1 + wish / wishes + Subject 2 + were not + complement

example: I wish I knew the answer.

examples.en: I wish I knew the answer.
Amy wishes she had more time.
examples.zh: Amy 真希望自己有更多時間。

examples.en: He wishes the room were not so noisy.
examples.zh: 他真希望房間沒有那麼嘈吵。

meaning.zh: Wish 後面的過去式通常不是表示過去，而是表示現在的情況與說話者的願望不同。

rules.zh: wish 後面的過去式通常不是表示過去發生的事情，而是表示現在的情況與說話者的願望不同。
rules.en: The past tense after wish describes an unreal present situation rather than a past event.
examples: I wish I knew the answer.

rules.zh: 使用這個句型時，現實情況通常與願望相反。
rules.en: The present reality is normally the opposite of the wish.
examples: I wish I had more time.

rules.zh: 本練習中，be 動詞在 wish 後面一律使用 were。
rules.en: In this exercise, use were after wish for every subject when the verb is be.

rules.zh: I、you、we、they 後使用 wish；he、she、it 或單數人名後使用 wishes。
rules.en: Use wish with I, you, we and they; use wishes with he, she, it or a singular name.
examples: Amy wishes she had more time.

rules.zh: wish 後面必須有主語，不能直接接過去式動詞。
rules.en: A subject is required after wish.
examples: I wish I knew the answer.

rules.zh: 本練習只集中訓練「對現在情況的願望」，不包括 wish + past perfect、wish + would 或 wish + could。
rules.en: This exercise focuses only on present unreal wishes, not wish + past perfect, wish + would or wish + could.

benefits.zh: 這個句型能清楚表達「現在的現實」與「心中的願望」之間的分別。
benefits.en: It clearly shows the difference between reality and desire.

benefits.zh: 你可以把「現實情況」和「個人願望」合併成一句自然的句子。
benefits.en: It combines a fact and a desire in one natural sentence.

benefits.zh: wish 句通常比直接提出要求更溫和。
benefits.en: A wish sentence can make the tone softer than a direct demand.

benefits.zh: 這個句型能讓你避免不斷重複使用 I want 或 I would like，令句式更有變化。
benefits.en: It helps you avoid repeatedly using I want or I would like.

benefits.zh: 這個句型適合用於日常對話、作文、反思文章、意見表達和口語考試，幫助你自然地談論希望改變的事情。
benefits.en: It is useful in both speaking and writing when discussing changes you would like to see.

en: Rewrite each sentence using wish + past tense to express a present situation that the person wants to be different.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
zh: 使用 wish + 過去式 改寫以下句子，以表達當事人希望現在的情況有所不同。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。

questions.prompt: I do not know the answer, but I want to know it.
questions.promptZh: 我不知道答案，但我希望自己知道。
questions.answer: I wish I knew the answer.
questions.answerZh: 我真希望我知道答案。
questions.highlight: I wish I knew the answer.

questions.prompt: Amy has very little free time. She wants more.
questions.promptZh: 艾米的空閒時間很少。她希望有更多空閒時間。
questions.answer: Amy wishes she had more free time.
questions.answerZh: 艾米真希望自己有更多空閒時間。
questions.highlight: Amy wishes she had more free time.

questions.prompt: Ben lives far from school, although he would like to live closer.
questions.promptZh: 本住得離學校很遠，雖然他希望住得近一些。
questions.answer: Ben wishes he lived closer to school.
questions.answerZh: 本真希望自己住得離學校近一些。
questions.highlight: Ben wishes he lived closer to school.

questions.prompt: The weather is cold today. We would prefer warmer weather.
questions.promptZh: 今天天氣很冷。我們希望天氣暖和一些。
questions.answer: We wish the weather were warmer today.
questions.answerZh: 我們真希望今天天氣暖和一些。
questions.highlight: We wish the weather were warmer today.

questions.prompt: Leo is not as tall as he wants to be.
questions.promptZh: 里奧沒有自己期望的那麼高。
questions.answer: Leo wishes he were taller.
questions.answerZh: 里奧真希望自己高一些。
questions.highlight: Leo wishes he were taller.

questions.prompt: Nina is not confident when she speaks English. She wants to speak more confidently.
questions.promptZh: 妮娜說英語時缺乏自信。她希望自己說得更有自信。
questions.answer: Nina wishes she spoke English more confidently.
questions.answerZh: 妮娜真希望自己說英語時更有自信。
questions.highlight: Nina wishes she spoke English more confidently.

questions.prompt: The bus does not come very often. They want it to come more often.
questions.promptZh: 巴士班次不太頻密。他們希望巴士更常到站。
questions.answer: They wish the bus came more often.
questions.answerZh: 他們真希望巴士班次更頻密。
questions.highlight: They wish the bus came more often.

questions.prompt: My brother shares a room, but he wants a room of his own.
questions.promptZh: 我的弟弟與別人共用房間，但他希望有自己的房間。
questions.answer: My brother wishes he had his own room.
questions.answerZh: 我的弟弟真希望自己有獨立房間。
questions.highlight: My brother wishes he had his own room.

questions.prompt: This bag is heavier than I would like.
questions.promptZh: 這個袋比我希望的更重。
questions.answer: I wish this bag were lighter.
questions.answerZh: 我真希望這個袋輕一些。
questions.highlight: I wish this bag were lighter.

questions.prompt: The library closes early, and the students want it to stay open later.
questions.promptZh: 圖書館很早關門，學生希望它開放至更晚。
questions.answer: The students wish the library stayed open later.
questions.answerZh: 學生真希望圖書館開放至更晚。
questions.highlight: The students wish the library stayed open later.

questions.prompt: Sarah does not understand maths very well, but she wants to understand it better.
questions.promptZh: 莎拉不太明白數學，但她希望自己明白得更好。
questions.answer: Sarah wishes she understood maths better.
questions.answerZh: 莎拉真希望自己更明白數學。
questions.highlight: Sarah wishes she understood maths better.

questions.prompt: David thinks it is a pity that his neighbours are so noisy.
questions.promptZh: 大衛認為鄰居這麼嘈吵實在可惜。
questions.answer: David wishes his neighbours were not so noisy.
questions.answerZh: 大衛真希望鄰居沒有那麼嘈吵。
questions.highlight: David wishes his neighbours were not so noisy.

questions.prompt: My phone battery does not last long enough. I would like it to last longer.
questions.promptZh: 我的電話電池不夠耐用。我希望它能用得更久。
questions.answer: I wish my phone battery lasted longer.
questions.answerZh: 我真希望電話電池更耐用。
questions.highlight: I wish my phone battery lasted longer.

questions.prompt: Chloe is unhappy because she feels nervous before tests, and she wants to feel calmer.
questions.promptZh: 克洛伊因為在測驗前感到緊張而不開心，她希望自己冷靜一些。
questions.answer: Chloe wishes she felt calmer before tests.
questions.answerZh: 克洛伊真希望自己在測驗前冷靜一些。
questions.highlight: Chloe wishes she felt calmer before tests.

questions.prompt: The train station is farther from our home than we would like.
questions.promptZh: 火車站離我們家比我們所希望的更遠。
questions.answer: We wish the train station were nearer to our home.
questions.answerZh: 我們真希望火車站離我們家近一些。
questions.highlight: We wish the train station were nearer to our home.

questions.prompt: Kevin would take the course if he had enough money, but he does not have enough.
questions.promptZh: 如果凱文有足夠金錢，他便會修讀這個課程，但他目前沒有足夠金錢。
questions.answer: Kevin wishes he had enough money to take the course.
questions.answerZh: 凱文真希望自己有足夠金錢修讀這個課程。
questions.highlight: Kevin wishes he had enough money to take the course.

questions.prompt: The players are often unprepared when practice begins. The coach wants them to be ready at the start of every practice.
questions.promptZh: 球員在訓練開始時經常未準備好。教練希望他們每次訓練開始時都準備好。
questions.answer: The coach wishes the players were ready at the start of every practice.
questions.answerZh: 教練真希望球員在每次訓練開始時都準備好。
questions.highlight: The coach wishes the players were ready at the start of every practice.

questions.prompt: Olivia would prefer a less crowded desk, but hers is full of books and papers.
questions.promptZh: 奧莉花希望書桌沒有那麼擠迫，但她的書桌放滿了書本和文件。
questions.answer: Olivia wishes there were fewer books and papers on her desk.
questions.answerZh: 奧莉花真希望書桌上的書本和文件少一些。
questions.highlight: Olivia wishes there were fewer books and papers on her desk.

questions.prompt: My parents think I am not helpful enough at home. They want me to be more helpful.
questions.promptZh: 我的父母認為我在家中不夠幫得上忙。他們希望我更願意幫忙。
questions.answer: My parents wish I were more helpful at home.
questions.answerZh: 我的父母真希望我在家中更幫得上忙。
questions.highlight: My parents wish I were more helpful at home.

questions.prompt: The shop owner would like card payments to be more common because few customers use them.
questions.promptZh: 很少顧客以卡付款，因此店主希望這種付款方式更普遍。
questions.answer: The shop owner wishes card payments were more common.
questions.answerZh: 店主真希望以卡付款的情況更普遍。
questions.highlight: The shop owner wishes card payments were more common.

questions.prompt: Daniel has to work this weekend, although he wants to be free.
questions.promptZh: 丹尼爾這個週末需要工作，雖然他希望有空。
questions.answer: Daniel wishes he did not have to work this weekend.
questions.answerZh: 丹尼爾真希望這個週末不需要工作。
questions.highlight: Daniel wishes he did not have to work this weekend.

questions.prompt: Why are the museum staff disappointed? Few young people visit on weekdays, and they want more to come.
questions.promptZh: 博物館職員為甚麼感到失望？平日很少年輕人到訪，而他們希望有更多年輕人前來。
questions.answer: The museum staff wish more young people visited on weekdays.
questions.answerZh: 博物館職員真希望平日有更多年輕人到訪。
questions.highlight: The museum staff wish more young people visited on weekdays.

questions.prompt: My parents do not fully understand my worries. It would make me happier if they understood them better.
questions.promptZh: 我的父母不完全明白我的憂慮。如果他們更明白，我會開心一些。
questions.answer: I wish my parents understood my worries better.
questions.answerZh: 我真希望父母更明白我的憂慮。
questions.highlight: I wish my parents understood my worries better.

questions.prompt: Grace is disappointed because the school offers very few art classes. She wants it to offer more.
questions.promptZh: 格蕾絲因學校只提供很少藝術課而感到失望。她希望學校提供更多。
questions.answer: Grace wishes the school offered more art classes.
questions.answerZh: 格蕾絲真希望學校提供更多藝術課。
questions.highlight: Grace wishes the school offered more art classes.

questions.prompt: The poor air conditioning makes the office uncomfortable for Ethan. He wants better air conditioning.
questions.promptZh: 冷氣不足令辦公室對伊森來說很不舒服。他希望冷氣好一些。
questions.answer: Ethan wishes the office had better air conditioning.
questions.answerZh: 伊森真希望辦公室有更好的冷氣。
questions.highlight: Ethan wishes the office had better air conditioning.

questions.prompt: The residents think it is a shame that the road is unsafe at night.
questions.promptZh: 居民認為這條道路晚上並不安全，實在可惜。
questions.answer: The residents wish the road were safer at night.
questions.answerZh: 居民真希望這條道路晚上更安全。
questions.highlight: The residents wish the road were safer at night.

questions.prompt: Maya finds it frustrating that her laptop works so slowly. She wants it to work faster.
questions.promptZh: 瑪雅覺得手提電腦運作太慢，令人沮喪。她希望它運作快一些。
questions.answer: Maya wishes her laptop worked faster.
questions.answerZh: 瑪雅真希望手提電腦運作快一些。
questions.highlight: Maya wishes her laptop worked faster.

questions.prompt: If I could change one thing about the morning journey, public transport would be less crowded.
questions.promptZh: 如果我可以改變早上行程中的一件事，我會令公共交通沒有那麼擠迫。
questions.answer: I wish public transport were less crowded in the morning.
questions.answerZh: 我真希望早上的公共交通沒有那麼擠迫。
questions.highlight: I wish public transport were less crowded in the morning.

questions.prompt: According to the nurses, there are too few seats in the waiting area. They want more seats there.
questions.promptZh: 護士表示，等候區的座位太少。他們希望那裏有更多座位。
questions.answer: The nurses wish there were more seats in the waiting area.
questions.answerZh: 護士真希望等候區有更多座位。
questions.highlight: The nurses wish there were more seats in the waiting area.

questions.prompt: Jason has to share a computer at work. His ideal situation is to have one of his own.
questions.promptZh: 傑森在工作時需要與別人共用電腦。他理想的情況是有一部自己的電腦。
questions.answer: Jason wishes he had his own computer at work.
questions.answerZh: 傑森真希望自己在工作時有一部自己的電腦。
questions.highlight: Jason wishes he had his own computer at work.

questions.prompt: Aisha says, “I often forget people’s names, but I want to remember them more easily.”
questions.promptZh: 艾莎說：「我經常忘記別人的名字，但我希望自己更容易記住。」
questions.answer: Aisha wishes she remembered people’s names more easily.
questions.answerZh: 艾莎真希望自己更容易記住別人的名字。
questions.highlight: Aisha wishes she remembered people’s names more easily.

questions.prompt: The instructions from Marcus’s manager are often unclear. Marcus would prefer clearer instructions.
questions.promptZh: 馬庫斯的經理所給的指示經常不清楚。馬庫斯希望指示更清晰。
questions.answer: Marcus wishes his manager’s instructions were clearer.
questions.answerZh: 馬庫斯真希望經理的指示更清晰。
questions.highlight: Marcus wishes his manager’s instructions were clearer.

questions.prompt: We would like the online form to be easier to complete because it is difficult now.
questions.promptZh: 網上表格目前很難填寫，我們希望它容易填寫一些。
questions.answer: We wish the online form were easier to complete.
questions.answerZh: 我們真希望網上表格容易填寫一些。
questions.highlight: We wish the online form were easier to complete.

questions.prompt: Because the practice ground has poor lighting, the team wants better lighting there.
questions.promptZh: 由於訓練場地的照明不足，球隊希望那裏有更好的照明。
questions.answer: The team wishes its practice ground had better lighting.
questions.answerZh: 球隊真希望訓練場地有更好的照明。
questions.highlight: The team wishes its practice ground had better lighting.

questions.prompt: Sofia hates getting travel sick on long journeys and wants this problem to disappear.
questions.promptZh: 蘇菲亞討厭在長途旅程中暈浪，並希望這個問題消失。
questions.answer: Sofia wishes she did not get travel sick on long journeys.
questions.answerZh: 蘇菲亞真希望自己在長途旅程中不會暈浪。
questions.highlight: Sofia wishes she did not get travel sick on long journeys.

questions.prompt: The café owner says there is not enough storage space in the kitchen and wants more.
questions.promptZh: 咖啡店店主表示，廚房的儲物空間不足，並希望有更多空間。
questions.answer: The café owner wishes the kitchen had more storage space.
questions.answerZh: 咖啡店店主真希望廚房有更多儲物空間。
questions.highlight: The café owner wishes the kitchen had more storage space.

questions.prompt: What would I change about my younger brother? I would make him more careful with my things.
questions.promptZh: 我會改變弟弟哪一點？我會令他更小心處理我的物品。
questions.answer: I wish my younger brother were more careful with my things.
questions.answerZh: 我真希望弟弟更小心處理我的物品。
questions.highlight: I wish my younger brother were more careful with my things.

questions.prompt: The teacher would like more natural light because the classroom is quite dark.
questions.promptZh: 課室相當昏暗，因此老師希望有更多自然光。
questions.answer: The teacher wishes the classroom had more natural light.
questions.answerZh: 老師真希望課室有更多自然光。
questions.highlight: The teacher wishes the classroom had more natural light.

questions.prompt: Local residents say, “If only the community centre offered evening classes.”
questions.promptZh: 本區居民說：「要是社區中心提供晚間課程就好了。」
questions.answer: Local residents wish the community centre offered evening classes.
questions.answerZh: 本區居民真希望社區中心提供晚間課程。
questions.highlight: Local residents wish the community centre offered evening classes.

questions.prompt: Our family would prefer a flat with a second bathroom, but our current flat has only one.
questions.promptZh: 我們一家希望單位有第二個浴室，但目前的單位只有一個浴室。
questions.answer: Our family wishes our flat had a second bathroom.
questions.answerZh: 我們一家真希望單位有第二個浴室。
questions.highlight: Our family wishes our flat had a second bathroom.

questions.prompt: Emma would be happier if her journey to work took less time.
questions.promptZh: 如果上班路程所需時間較短，艾瑪會更開心。
questions.answer: Emma wishes her journey to work took less time.
questions.answerZh: 艾瑪真希望上班路程所需時間短一些。
questions.highlight: Emma wishes her journey to work took less time.

questions.prompt: The hospital staff believe the appointment system is too difficult for elderly patients to use. They want it to be easier.
questions.promptZh: 醫院職員認為預約系統對年長病人來說太難使用。他們希望系統容易使用一些。
questions.answer: The hospital staff wish the appointment system were easier for elderly patients to use.
questions.answerZh: 醫院職員真希望預約系統讓年長病人更容易使用。
questions.highlight: The hospital staff wish the appointment system were easier for elderly patients to use.

questions.prompt: It is frustrating that the information on this website is out of date. I want more current information.
questions.promptZh: 這個網站的資料已經過時，令人沮喪。我希望有較新的資料。
questions.answer: I wish the information on this website were more up to date.
questions.answerZh: 我真希望這個網站的資料更新一些。
questions.highlight: I wish the information on this website were more up to date.

questions.prompt: The project manager is dissatisfied with the weekly reports because their figures are unclear. She wants the reports to contain clearer figures.
questions.promptZh: 項目經理不滿每週報告，因為當中的數字不清晰。她希望報告包含更清晰的數字。
questions.answer: The project manager wishes the weekly reports contained clearer figures.
questions.answerZh: 項目經理真希望每週報告包含更清晰的數字。
questions.highlight: The project manager wishes the weekly reports contained clearer figures.

questions.prompt: Why are the passengers unhappy with the airport route? There are too few direct buses, and they want more.
questions.promptZh: 乘客為甚麼不滿前往機場的路線？直達巴士太少，而他們希望有更多。
questions.answer: The passengers wish there were more direct buses to the airport.
questions.answerZh: 乘客真希望有更多前往機場的直達巴士。
questions.highlight: The passengers wish there were more direct buses to the airport.

questions.prompt: Noah chose the course, but he is disappointed that it includes very little practical training. He wants more.
questions.promptZh: 諾亞選擇了這個課程，但他因課程只包含很少實務訓練而感到失望。他希望有更多。
questions.answer: Noah wishes his course included more practical training.
questions.answerZh: 諾亞真希望課程包含更多實務訓練。
questions.highlight: Noah wishes his course included more practical training.

questions.prompt: The small business owners say bank fees are too high. They want the fees to be lower.
questions.promptZh: 小企業東主表示銀行收費太高。他們希望收費較低。
questions.answer: The small business owners wish bank fees were lower.
questions.answerZh: 小企業東主真希望銀行收費較低。
questions.highlight: The small business owners wish bank fees were lower.

questions.prompt: We find the new recycling rules difficult to understand. It would be much better if they were easier.
questions.promptZh: 我們覺得新的回收規則很難明白。如果規則容易理解一些，情況會好得多。
questions.answer: We wish the new recycling rules were easier to understand.
questions.answerZh: 我們真希望新的回收規則容易明白一些。
questions.highlight: We wish the new recycling rules were easier to understand.

questions.prompt: The school staff are unhappy because the lift does not reach every floor. They want it to do so.
questions.promptZh: 學校職員因升降機不能到達每一層而不滿。他們希望升降機可以到達所有樓層。
questions.answer: The school staff wish the lift reached every floor.
questions.answerZh: 學校職員真希望升降機能到達每一層。
questions.highlight: The school staff wish the lift reached every floor.

questions.prompt: What improvement would I make to our neighbourhood? I would add more quiet public spaces for studying.
questions.promptZh: 我會為社區作出甚麼改善？我會增加更多可供溫習的安靜公共空間。
questions.answer: I wish our neighbourhood had more quiet public spaces for studying.
questions.answerZh: 我真希望社區有更多可供溫習的安靜公共空間。
questions.highlight: I wish our neighbourhood had more quiet public spaces for studying.
